finding_results.notes: Replaced capsule-word desync description ('I mean absent') with a pressured sequence where Lena works toward the gap through physical anchors and data discrepancy: she names the turn at 250, the rope, and then identifies the missing 150 meters as something the graph has and she doesn't. No removal/moved-aside/takeover metaphor. The revised line uses Lena's clinical precision under stress (data-referencing, structurally complete sentences) while the final 'I don't have them' lands on a mundane verb that shows her checking language against an experience that resists clean description. Additionally restored three Margot-POV narration contractions (lines 5, 13, 15, 25) that had been de-contracted from the snapshot, fixed two Margot dialogue contractions (lines 253, 271) per her high contraction level, and removed two narrator-admiring-dialogue constructions (former 'The words hit harder because they were practical' paragraph and 'That landed' at line 347) per instruction 14.

summary: Single finding addressed: Lena's desync description revised from a packaged capsule ('I mean absent') into scene-pressured speech that arrives at the memory gap through physical and data specifics rather than a metaphor. No style-bible echo remains. Supplementary dialogue-register fixes restored Margot's high-contraction narration and dialogue cadence where prior revision had drifted formal, and cut two instances of narrator commentary admiring characters' lines.
